footer.description: We connect capital with real projects through documented contracts, based on the principle of profit and loss sharing with complete transparency.

projects.title: Real Projects, Safe Investment
projects.description: Choose from {count} vetted projects, distributed across multiple sectors and regions.
projects.noProjects: No projects in this category at the moment.

home.hero_tagline: Smart Investment.. According to Sharia Principles.
home.hero_subtitle: Amana Invest connects your capital with real projects, through capital partnership and equity ownership — with documented and transparent contracts.
home.investment_title: Invest in Documented and Transparent Projects
home.investment_subtitle: Every transaction on the platform is documented with a trusted and transparent electronic contract.
home.partnership_desc: You contribute an amount of money to the project, profits are divided according to agreement, and losses are borne according to the contribution ratio.
home.ownership_desc: You buy shares representing actual ownership in the project, at a fixed value, with the possibility of reselling the shares later.
home.cta_subtitle: Join thousands of investors and project founders on a transparent and secure investment platform.

packages.title: Packages
packages.description: Choose the package that suits your investment journey.

education.title: Learn Investment Step by Step
education.description: Educational packages covering investment basics, financing mechanisms, portfolio building, and financial statements reading — supervised by specialists and financial experts.
education.warning: Investing without understanding financing mechanisms can lead to financial mistakes. We provide you with knowledge before we provide you with opportunity.

about.title: Investment at Amana
about.subtitle: Documented operating procedures, transparent rules and real projects.
about.description: Amana Invest is a digital investment platform that connects investors with project owners within a financial system based on participation and equity ownership, with documented and transparent electronic contracts.
about.mission_desc: Build a global investment platform covering Algeria, the Maghreb, the Gulf countries and Asian countries.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: We are here to help you start your investment.

contract.title: Contract
contract.profits_losses: Profits and losses are determined according to the agreement within the formal contract and actual project results.
